chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-2008 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.8619/25 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.8620/25 (151 CPC) 23.12.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abassi, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Granted. 2. Counsel for petitioner submits that he has filed original offer letter with the petition, which is not required for the verification. Therefore he submits that same may be returned to him. AAG present in other matters waives notice of application and conceded the submissions. Under these circumstances, application is allowed and office is directed to return the original offer letter and kept copies of the same in the record. Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
